Class FireBall

java.lang.Object
spell.Spell
spell.FireBall
public class FireBall extends Spell
Represents a concrete implementation of a fire-based offensive spell. * The FireBall spell deals high area-of-effect (AoE) damage to all enemies within a specific circular radius. It utilizes visual cues and sound effects to provide feedback to the player upon successful casting.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • FireBall

      public FireBall(List<Enemy> enemies, javafx.scene.layout.Pane gameLayer)
      Constructs a FireBall spell with specific damage, range, and environmental references.
      Parameters:
      enemies - The current list of enemies present in the game.
      gameLayer - The JavaFX Pane used for adding visual animation nodes.

  • Method Details

    • cast

      public void cast(double x, double y)
      Executes the fireball logic at the target location. * The casting process follows these steps: 1. Proximity Check: Iterates through the enemy list and calculates Euclidean distance to apply damage if they are within the range. 2. Audio Feedback: Plays the static fireballSound. 3. Visual Feedback: Renders a temporary semi-transparent Circle to represent the explosion area. 4. Resource Cleanup: Uses a Timeline to remove the visual node after a short duration.
      Specified by:
      cast in class Spell
      Parameters:
      x - The horizontal coordinate where the fireball impacts.
      y - The vertical coordinate where the fireball impacts.
